where.if: AND (company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR business_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM tb_company
ORDER BY company_name ASC

SELECT c.*, t.tenant_name as tenantName FROM tb_company c LEFT JOIN tb_tenant t ON c.tenant_id = t.tenant_id
AND c.company_type = #{companyType}
AND (c.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR c.business_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
AND c.status = 'ACTIVE'
ORDER BY c.company_name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_company ( tenant_id, company_type, seller_type, company_name, business_no, ceo_name, postal_code, address1, address2, phone, email, biz_status, status, default_tax_type, bank_name, account_no, account_holder, member_grade, credit_agreement_dt, credit_limit_amount, advance_balance, meat_money_balance ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{companyType}, #{sellerType}, #{companyName}, #{businessNo}, #{ceoName}, #{postalCode}, #{address1}, #{address2}, #{phone}, #{email}, 'ACTIVE', 'ACTIVE', COALESCE(#{defaultTaxType}, 'TAXABLE'), #{bankName}, #{accountNo}, #{accountHolder}, #{memberGrade}, #{creditAgreementDt}, #{creditLimitAmount}, #{advanceBalance}, #{meatMoneyBalance} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_company SET company_name = #{companyName}, ceo_name = #{ceoName}, seller_type = #{sellerType}, postal_code = #{postalCode}, address1 = #{address1}, address2 = #{address2}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, default_tax_type = #{defaultTaxType}, bank_name = #{bankName}, account_no = #{accountNo}, account_holder = #{accountHolder}, member_grade = #{memberGrade}, credit_agreement_dt = #{creditAgreementDt}, credit_limit_amount = #{creditLimitAmount}, advance_balance = #{advanceBalance}, meat_money_balance = #{meatMoneyBalance}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE company_id = #{companyId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_company_contact WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY is_primary DESC, created_at ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tb_company_contact ( company_id, contact_name, contact_role, mobile, email, is_primary, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{contactName}, #{contactRole}, #{mobile}, #{email},
#{isPrimary} 'N' , 'ACTIVE', NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_company_contact SET contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_role = #{contactRole}, mobile = #{mobile}, email = #{email}, is_primary = #{isPrimary} 'N' , updated_at = NOW() WHERE contact_id = #{contactId}
UPDATE tb_company_contact SET is_primary = 'N', updated_at = NOW() WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND is_primary = 'Y' AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT m.mapping_id, m.channel_id, m.company_role_cd, c.channel_name FROM tb_company_channel_map m JOIN tb_channel c ON m.channel_id = c.channel_id WHERE m.company_id = #{companyId} AND m.status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT * FROM tb_company_bank_account WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY is_default DESC, created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_company_bank_account SET bank_name = #{bankName}, account_no_enc = #{accountNoEnc}, account_holder = #{accountHolder}, is_default = #{isDefault}, account_no_last4 = #{accountNoLast4}, account_no_hash = #{accountNoHash}, enc_key_version = #{encKeyVersion}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE bank_account_id = #{bankAccountId}
